hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and normalizes multiple provider outputs into one operational workflow that supports compliance decisions, case management, regulatory updates and audit-ready evidence.

problem_title: Compliance workflows falter across disconnected providers
problem_description: Digital asset compliance teams struggle with fragmented outputs from multiple KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule providers. This separation creates manual handoffs, inconsistent risk views and gaps in audit-ready evidence that slow review and weaken operational control.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule provider results into one normalized operational workflow, enabling compliance teams to route reviews, manage cases and preserve audit-ready evidence seamlessly.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects multiple provider outputs into normalized results that flow through rules, reviews, cases, evidence preservation and structured compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases, and audit-ready evidence without replacing existing compliance tools or vendors.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for digital asset compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a vendor-neutral compliance layer that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and other provider outputs into structured workflows for digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate multiple providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes results from multiple providers, applies internal rules, routes reviews, creates cases, and preserves evidence within a connected compliance operating workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records decision logs, case histories and supporting evidence to maintain audit-ready, defensible records for compliance teams and regulatory review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is designed to connect with existing providers and compliance tools, layering on governance, access control and workflow orchestration without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers; it aggregates and structures their outputs to support consistent compliance decisions and scalable operational workflows.
final_title: Connect provider outputs into audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY structures multi-vendor data into controlled workflows, evidence preservation, case management and regulatory update support.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
